items.title: Aboriginal children's book pulled over illustrator's Bondi attack comments
items.dek: Several writers have cut ties with the University of Queensland Press for cancelling the book.
items.body: Several writers have cut ties with the University of Queensland Press for cancelling the book.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Kenyan leader sparks uproar after mocking Nigerians' spoken English
items.dek: William Ruto says Kenyans speak "some of the best English in the world" while it is hard to understand Nigerians.
items.body: William Ruto says Kenyans speak "some of the best English in the world" while it is hard to understand Nigerians.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Steve Rosenberg: Kremlin's tightening grip on internet fuels public discontent
items.dek: Throughout Russia, internet usage has become seriously restricted. Citizens are drawing comparison to Soviet censorship and today's digital blackouts.
items.body: Throughout Russia, internet usage has become seriously restricted. Citizens are drawing comparison to Soviet censorship and today's digital blackouts.
items.author: IriLine Desk
